name: DYKE-DAVIDOFF-MASON SYNDROME
definition: CEREBRAL HEMIATROPHY = INFANTILE / CONGENITAL HEMIPLEGIA = unilateral cerebral atrophy with ipsilateral small skull
discriminating_features: unilateral decrease in size of cranial fossa
compensatory enlargement of adjacent ventricle + sulci with midline shift

general: unilateral decrease in size of cranial fossa
compensatory enlargement of adjacent ventricle + sulci with midline shift
